india.title: Latvian PM resigns due to split in alliance over Russian drones
india.summary: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned after her coalition government collapsed due to disagreements over Ukrainian drone incidents. The Progressive Party withdrew support after Silina dismissed the defense minister for failing to address drones flying from Russia. President Edgars Rinkevics will now consult parties to form a new government ahead of October elections.

business.title: Sebi proposes major overhaul of derivatives rules to simplify compliance for exchanges
business.summary: India's market regulator Sebi is proposing significant changes to derivatives trading rules. The aim is to make compliance easier for stock exchanges and clearing corporations. business.title: Honda suspends plans for new electric vehicle plant in Canada

Canada's auto industry has also been hit uniquely hard by Trump's tariffs, given the deep integration of the North American auto sector.  bs/ksb
